auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Mocean API token sent as an Authorization bearer token. Generate it from Dashboard > API Account > Generate Token: https://dashboard.moceanapi.com/.

actions.name: get_balance
actions.description: Retrieve the current Mocean account balance.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Mocean account balance.

status.description: Mocean response status code. Zero indicates a successful request.

value.description: Current Mocean account balance value returned by Mocean.

actions.name: get_message_status
actions.description: Retrieve the delivery status for a Mocean SMS message.

messageId.description: Mocean message ID returned by send_sms.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving the delivery status of an outbound Mocean SMS message.

status.description: Mocean response status code. Zero indicates a successful request.

messageStatus.description: Mocean delivery status code for the message. Documented values include delivered, failed, expired, pending, and not found.

outputSchema.description: Mocean outbound SMS message status response.

actions.name: list_pricing
actions.description: Retrieve Mocean account pricing for SMS, number lookup, or verify services.

type.description: Mocean service type to retrieve pricing for.

mcc.description: Mobile Country Code to filter pricing by destination.

mnc.description: Mobile Network Code to filter pricing by operator.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for retrieving Mocean account pricing.

status.description: Mocean response status code. Zero indicates a successful request.

country.description: Destination country name returned by Mocean.

operator.description: Destination operator name returned by Mocean.

mcc.description: Mobile Country Code returned by Mocean.

mnc.description: Mobile Network Code returned by Mocean.

price.description: Price returned by Mocean for this destination.

currency.description: Currency code returned by Mocean for the price.

items.description: Pricing entry for one Mocean destination or operator.

destinations.description: Pricing entries returned by Mocean for the requested destination filters.

actions.name: lookup_number
actions.description: Look up carrier information for a phone number through Mocean.

to.description: Phone number to look up, including country code.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for performing a synchronous Mocean number lookup.

status.description: Mocean response status code. Zero indicates a successful request.

messageId.description: Mocean message identifier for the lookup.

to.description: Phone number returned by Mocean for the lookup.

networkCode.description: Carrier network code returned by Mocean.

mcc.description: Carrier Mobile Country Code returned by Mocean.

mnc.description: Carrier Mobile Network Code returned by Mocean.

networkCode.description: Carrier network code returned by Mocean.

mcc.description: Carrier Mobile Country Code returned by Mocean.

mnc.description: Carrier Mobile Network Code returned by Mocean.

ported.description: Mocean porting status for the phone number.

actions.name: send_sms
actions.description: Send an SMS message through Mocean.

from.description: SMS sender ID shown to the recipient.

to.description: Recipient phone number including country code.

text.description: SMS message text to send to the recipient.

deliveryReportUrl.description: Callback URL that Mocean should call with delivery report updates.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for sending an SMS message with Mocean.

status.description: Mocean response status code. Zero indicates a successful request.

receiver.description: Phone number that Mocean accepted for this message.

messageId.description: Mocean message identifier returned for status queries.

errorMessage.description: Mocean error message when the recipient submission failed.

items.description: Result for one SMS recipient returned by Mocean.

messages.description: Per-recipient SMS submission results returned by Mocean.
